_comment: MCP config template for Agentic Light. Copy this file to ../.mcp.json (workspace root) and add your own servers under mcpServers. Example entry: "example-server": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@your-org/your-mcp-server"], "env": { "SERVER_URL": "https://your-server.example.com" } }. For an HTTP/SSE server use: "example-server": { "type": "sse", "url": "https://your-server.example.com/sse" }. Do NOT commit a real .mcp.json containing internal URLs or credentials.
_disabled_examples_comment: Common presets — not active. Move an entry into mcpServers to enable it.
